message:
feat(sqlite): add SQLite online backup API support

Implements the SQLite backup API for creating live database backups:

- Add sqlite3_backup opaque handle type to FFI bindings
- Add backup_init, backup_step, backup_finish, backup_remaining,
  backup_pagecount FFI function declarations
- Implement backup_to_path() for backing up to a file path
- Implement backup_to_connection() for backing up to another connection

The backup implementation:
- Uses proper deadlock-avoiding lock ordering (address-based)
- Handles SQLITE_BUSY/SQLITE_LOCKED with retry loop and 50ms sleep
- Processes 100 pages per step for responsive progress
- Returns detailed error messages on failure

This enables safe hot backups of in-use databases without stopping
the application, useful for periodic snapshots and replication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
